dag.description: XGBoost multi-task end-to-end pipeline with TEMPORAL-SPLIT preprocessing (time-based train split), dual evaluation (testing + calibration paths), model calibration, packaging, and registration.

metadata.name: xgboost_mt_temporal_split_e2e
metadata.description: XGBoost multi-task end-to-end pipeline with TEMPORAL-SPLIT preprocessing (time-based train split), dual evaluation (testing + calibration paths), model calibration, packaging, and registration.

agent_context.when_to_use: XGBoost multi-task learning (one_output_per_tree) on time-series/temporal data where the train/test boundary MUST be split chronologically (no future data leaks into training). Predict multiple related labels simultaneously with a time-ordered split and a dedicated held-out testing evaluation path.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: Non-temporal data where a random split is appropriate. Single-task XGBoost (use xgboost/complete_e2e). Unrelated tasks (train separately). LightGBM-family MTL (use mtl/temporal_split_e2e).
differentiators: XgboostMt framework — multi-task XGBoost (one_output_per_tree) predicting multiple labels simultaneously
TemporalSplitPreprocessing on the training path (time-ordered split) instead of TabularPreprocessing — prevents temporal leakage
Separate XgboostMtModelEval_testing path (held-out chronological test) in addition to the calibration eval path
Dual evaluation: testing (from the temporal split) + calibration (from a separate Cradle query)

prerequisites.how: Data has a timestamp/date column to define the chronological train/test boundary
Data has 2+ label columns that benefit from joint training

common_pitfalls: Temporal split boundary must be set so the test window has enough data for meaningful evaluation
Do not shuffle across the temporal boundary — that reintroduces leakage
Tasks must be correlated for MTL benefit — independent tasks train better separately

temporal_data?.yes: USE THIS DAG (chronological split prevents leakage)
temporal_data?.no: Use xgboost/complete_e2e (single-task) or a random-split MTL DAG
